title: crotalaria boranica
intro: Crotalaria boranica, also known as Boran weed or Stinking rosemallow, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in traditional African medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The health benefits of Crotalaria boranica include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce pain and prevent the spread of infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health issues.
